creator: ianlo0511@gmail.com
text:
When building audio/soundtouch 1.9.2, the following error messages occur:

soundstretch-main.o: In function `main':
main.cpp:(.text.startup+0x28b): undefined reference to `operator delete(void*, unsigned long)'
main.cpp:(.text.startup+0x392): undefined reference to `operator delete(void*, unsigned long)'
main.cpp:(.text.startup+0x3df): undefined reference to `operator delete(void*, unsigned long)'
main.cpp:(.text.startup+0x3f7): undefined reference to `operator delete(void*, unsigned long)'
soundstretch-WavFile.o: In function `WavFileBase::~WavFileBase()':
WavFile.cpp:(.text+0x43): undefined reference to `operator delete(void*, unsigned long)'
soundstretch-WavFile.o:WavFile.cpp:(.text+0xb3): more undefined references to `operator delete(void*, unsigned long)' follow
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[4]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/soundtouch/work/soundtouch/source/SoundStretch
*** Error code 1

Stop.

*** Error code 1

build time: 00:01:21
!!! build failure encountered !!!
